author: Samuel W.
pros: The software is really easy to use. From the UI down to sorting and communication , LiveHire is really user friendly. In particular I like the talent pool function and messaging. It is super easy to send comms out to candidates via email and SMS.
cons: There is limited functionality between LiveHire and outlook. It would be great if i can invite candidates to an interview from LiveHire which will then directly populate into my outlook.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Customer service is abysmal, cannot get through to anyone in a timely manner. Do not reply to tickets in a timely manner. Difficult to deal with. Software is decent, it's just the customer service experience that really lets this software down.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Software does a good job, does everything that you need it to do.
cons: Customer service is absolutely abysmal. Hard to get hold of a human for support, tickets can be left open for months on end. Lack of followup at times.

description: Fairly straight forward to use once you get the hang of it, however I wouldn't say it's the most user friendly platform out there.
author: Hollie J.
pros: Staff can view their worked hours on the app.
cons: Back of house platform looked very outdated in a visual sense.

description: My experience with intelliHR has been very, very good. The implementation went extremely well and the responsiveness from intelliHR is second to none. I have been involved with other software implementations in the past, and intelliHR certainly surpassed my previous experiences. I love the fact that intelliHR listen to their clients, if you have feedback or suggestions, they act upon these. In the time we have been using intelliHR there have been a number of improvements that have been implemented, that just mean the software is even better. The introduction of the software has allowed me to be more responsive to the wider teams needs and provide them a significant amount of support that I just wasn't able to do in the past. This is largely as a result of the flow of feedback I can capture in the software. We are really starting to use the goal functionality the way it should be and I expect to see better engagement around goals from the team in the future.
author: Nichola B.
pros: I find the user interface very easy to use. Our staff have engaged really well with intelliHR and I believe the easy user interface is one of the reasons for this. The features I really love, is the goal functionality, the ease of setting up forms so we can get really useful feedback and have good performance review processes, the ability to set up automated workflow, task compliance and the analytics. When I first looked at this software I never thought I would use the analytics that much, but I have found them to be very useful and a massive time saver, especially for completing HR and remuneration surveys.
cons: The one feature I would really have liked, was the ability to produce templated letters or contracts. I would also like to be able to import data into intelliHR using a csv or xcel file. Presently there is an API, but this is one way, which isn't much help for me. Most other functions that I need from intelliHR if not available, I have been able to work our a work around.

description: Easy to use system, with supportive and responsive implementation and customer service. IntelliHR team works hard for continuous improvement and enhanced features.
author: Kate S.
pros: Dashboard is clean and easy to look at. Workflows have greatly enhanced onboarding for employees and HR team, reducing our manual and time-intensive tasks. Pulses give great snapshots into whatever we like to ask at any time. Very easy to use.
cons: No real cons. Enhancements are continuous and looking forward to integration with more and more products.

description: Fantastic! Of all the ATS systems used over the years, LiveHire balances the user experience with strong functionality and a humanistic approach to hiring. Highly recommend!
author: Sophie B.
pros: LiveHire helps to bridge the gap between technology and human connection in what can be a rather impersonal experience when job seeking. The functionality to bulk msg candidates, create simple msg templates, update at speed and communicate 1:1 with talent is exceptional. The ease of integration with other innovative tech such as Xref & Enboarder has been a huge win for the TA team, reducing the steps involved & time to complete the hiring process. The LiveHire support team are always on-hand to resolve platform issues, bugs, updates in an impressive turnaround time. LiveHire work with their customer base when considering new features, updates & builds that help to enhance the experience for both the end user & candidate alike.
cons: Only a minor con; losing draft msg when flicking between tabs & screens can be frustrating. More reporting options would be handy should business want to dig into specifics.

description: I have saved so much time with payroll using Ento. What used to take me several hours now only takes me an hour each week
author: Michelle W.
pros: I find the rostering and timesheets have saved me a lot of time in doing my payroll
cons: I have found it difficult to add in penalty rates for weekends and public holidays which means my budget is not correct

review_title: Intuitive system and great customer service!
description: The customer service I have received in all of my dealings with intelliHR have been nothing short of amazing. Whether it's a scheduled quarterly catch up or request for assistance - the team have been great to deal with, friendly, helpful and professional. I really like that the system is continuing to grow and has new features added regularly. It's been exciting to see features that we have enquired about or suggested then coming in to fruition at a late point. Working with a software/company that doesn't just say "No, we can't do that" and instead says "Let's look in to that for you" is such an awesome experience! intelliHR will always look for your "Why" to ascertain what it is exactly that you are trying to achieve - and to see how they can help you achieve it.
author: Bronte M.
pros: The system is very intuitive and therefore easy to learn/use. The interface is user friendly, easy to navigate and well though out. It's not "clunky" like some systems I've used in the past - and the self-service tiles are great and so easily accessible!
cons: The limitations surrounding some of the reporting functions can be frustrating, but I understand this is something that the intelliHR team are working on.

review_title: intelliHR is a terrific people management platform
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Ability to customise, customer support, ease of use
cons: Really very little - intelli meets so many of our requirements

review_title: If only all software was this easy to implement
description: I have been very impressed with the software and the support of the IntelliHR staff.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to implement and use. IntelliHR offer far more than just the software, they subject matter experts in this field.
cons: There are a few small UI changes needed, but nothing major.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Excellent. The customer service is exceptional and they always go above and beyond to try and accommodate our needs. Overall, it's a very easy to use platform that engages candidates well and helps build out talent pools to work more strategically and efficiently.
author: Fiona B.
pros: What we liked the most about Livehire was the ease of use for both recruiters and hiring managers. Most of all though it enables a brilliant candidate experience and enables fast and easy communication between recruiters and candidates. We get a lot of positive feedback from candidates who really enjoy the interaction with us via Livehire.
cons: The reporting and analytics still has some way to go. It's not easy or straightforward to pull a report or to customise for different needs within the recruitment team.

description: Great
author: Sofia M.
pros: Overall great tool. Friendly. Easy to use
cons: Would be great to be able to filter by locations for talent pooled candidates. Integration with other systems does not work sometimes but is easily fixed

description: It has been a really easy run . Most things are self explained.
author: Steven C.
pros: Very easy to use . Notify all clients of changes to scheduling .
cons: I can’t think of any cons . For everything we use this product for it is on point .

review_title: Easiest ATS I've used to date
description: Very happy, would recommend to people for sure.
author: Jasio D.
pros: Working through multiple roles at one time and across volume LiveHire is very capable of handling the challenge. Collaboration is easy as well with hiring managers being able to view and rate candidate profiles. The ability to integrate with our other pieces of HR tech is also a very impressive offering from LiveHire
cons: Some small things like loosing a message you started to type to a candidate then had to flick to another tab, the message dissapears. Also might be good to get better integration to SEEK as hyperlinks don't seem to flow through.

description: I've been training with [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] who is awesome! He is very upbeat and his energy is catchy. He knows the system back to front and is wonderful at training and in suggesting best ways to plan and to get the best use from the system. If [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] Mum doesn't mind, I'd like to adopt him!!
author: Karen C.
pros: It is easy to use, intuitive, adaptable and extremely useful in keeping all your important HR data in one place. It means you can constantly keep tabs on the vibe of the business and helps us put out sparks before they become flames.
cons: It would be good to include work based tasks for staff for supervisors to follow up on.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Really like Humanforce however I would like to see abit of easing of use around roster creation. Still the best roster software I’ve used.
author: Alex B.
pros: Very easy to integrate into and with other financial software. Live costing and award bonus calculating is very handy. Sign in via personal device is amazing.
cons: Ease of use for heads of department creating rosters compared to Deputy.

description: Overall I am very happy to use.
author: Ishan C.
pros: I can use in my phone so mobile app is most I liked.
cons: Unable to change the roster for my employees through the app

author: Luke L.
pros: Easy to use and one stop shop for all employee management
cons: Employees being able to Ento without having to speak to a manager

description: Overall, quite easy and good to use. Everything is in the one spot which makes it easy to do multiple things at once in a quick time frame
author: Claire S.
pros: Rostering and timesheets is what I enjoy most as it’s all in the one spot
cons: Sometimes hours do not load properly which is time consuming

description: Great experience, has helped with our rostering system
author: Emily S.
pros: I like the use of information throughout the app and on the web browser
cons: The thing i like least is that you have to update the app almost weekly

review_title: A focus on the experience and professional development of our most important resource
description: On day one we had more visibility over our workforce than we ever had before.
author: Jarrod S.
pros: IntelliHR is well designed and has a focus on the experience and professional development of our most important resource. Permissions model that allows easy access control, for example a First Aid role that allows first aid officers to see staff medical conditions and emergency contact details. The simple interface, staff were easily able to onboard themselves and set things up without training. The setup process with IntelliHR was exceptional - fast, responsive, and helpful.
cons: The integration with Xero is fairly basic and it has a more focused feature set.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Easy to use, less time consuming, very clear in-terms of details. increasing bond between candidate - Company, Candidate -Recruiter is the best part,
author: Rashmi B.
pros: Bridging features of LiveHire between Candidate and Recruiters are best in my view. which gives the candidate a hope that the call from recruiter is not a spam .. also which strengthens the bond between company and candidate.
cons: Exploring .. I feel Analytics part must be more clear in-terms of daily activities
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall Experience with IntelliHR has been great, super easy to use as a beginner, customer service has been wonderful, they often reply really quickly.
author: Beth W.
pros: IntelliHR is a user friendly platform, processes are easy to follow, the analytics are really interesting component to see the different statistics of the business.
cons: I haven't had any negative experiences with the platform as of yet.

description: Speaking with support 9/10 Using the software 9/10 Lodging tickets and receiving efficient and timely feedback 5/10
author: Stephen M.
pros: Ability to sync through other systems with the use of an API
cons: More ability to create own reporting in regards to daily rosters. Would like the ability to customise a daily roster printout to work with the are working in as the main headings.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I was working on establishing Azure SSO with intelliHR. I requested the feature intelliHR didn't have, but they followed up and came up with an interim solution until the permanent solution is ready. It was amazing that they didn't shut me down and came with the interim solution, which enhanced the security and provided greater login experience to the app for our users.
author: Jason J.
pros: They listen to their customers. Working with our account manager and the product manager were smooth and pleasure.
cons: Azure SSO only environment cannot be configured. It's on their roadmap though
